llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Import Export & Customs Ops Asia Pacific (Senior Executive)
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: O bjectives of the Position Drive efficient Import, Export, and Customs operations across the region by improving processes, standardizing workflows, and ensuring compliance with global, regional, and local regulations. Lead Projects relevant to IE and customs operations, ensuring process adherence, operational excellence, and continuous learning and development. Collaborate with cross-functional teams—including Country IE Customs Ops, Regional Customs Foreign Trade, Order Management, GBS, Finance, Procurement, and Business Units—to ensure full compliance with corporate and regulatory requirements. Oversee LLP LSP daily operations, track vendor performance against KPIs, manage escalations, drive continuous improvement with country teams, and lead improvement efforts to strengthen overall Supply Chain operations. Support business units by enhancing service efficiency and implementing improvement initiatives to boost service quality and process effectiveness. Foster a culture of service excellence with service providers, focusing on customer-centric Import/Export, Customs Foreign Trade operations, and strict regulatory compliance. M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Operational Management Lead and manage all import/export logistics processes, ensuring compliance with internal procedures. Analyze and resolve logistics issues, escalating to relevant teams when needed. Maintain issue logs and manage non-conformances with corrective actions. Reporting Analytics Prepare, verify, and consolidate operational reports and KPIs for management and stakeholders. Run regular data extracts and validate accuracy for performance and crisis reporting. Support performance analytics and reporting across regions, including vendor management metrics. Service Provider Management Oversee 3PL and LLP service providers for inbound/outbound transportation and customs. Conduct audits and random checks to ensure compliance with work instructions. Support logistics procurement activities, including tendering and contract adherence. Continuous Improvement Projects Drive continuous improvement initiatives and digitalization efforts in logistics operations. Participate in system testing, process enhancements, and assigned projects. Coordinate regular meetings and follow-ups on action items across import/export communities. Support new business requirements and customer logistics service needs. Stakeholder Engagement • Collaborate with business units, regional and global...
